channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: ENHYPEN Announce ‘BLOOD SAGA’ World Tour With Stops in the U.S., Latin America & Europe
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Hey K-pop fans, we've got some exciting news for you. ENHYPEN is hitting the road with their 'BLOOD SAGA' world tour. The announcement comes just a month after HEESEUNG announced his departure from the group to pursue a solo career. But don't worry, the remaining six members are ready to take their music global."
[Short music transition]
Host: "The tour kicks off in Seoul on May 1 with three sold-out shows at the KSPO Dome. Then, ENHYPEN will head to Latin America for the first time, with stops in São Paulo, Lima, and Mexico City. After that, they'll make their way to the US, performing in cities like Dallas, San Diego, and Las Vegas."
[Short music transition]
Host: "And that's not all - ENHYPEN will also be touring Europe and the UK in winter 2027, with shows in Milan, Paris, Amsterdam, Berlin, and London. If you're an ENGENE member, you can get presale tickets starting April 22. General on-sale begins on April 24, but don't forget to apply in advance on Weverse by April 19 to participate in the presale."
[Short music transition]
Host: "We've got the full list of tour dates and venues on our website. Make sure to check it out and mark your calendars. ENHYPEN's 'BLOOD SAGA' tour is going to be one you won't want to miss. Get ready to see Jake, Jay, Sunghoon, Sunoo, Jungwon, and Ni-ki take the stage and perform their hits live."
[Outro music plays]
Host: "Thanks for tuning in, and we'll see you on the road with ENHYPEN's 'BLOOD SAGA' tour."
